---
title: "Spaceship Titanic Data Cleaning"
author: "Hazem Masarani & Lam"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



# Load packages
```{r}

if (!requireNamespace("tidyverse")) install.packages('tidyverse')
if (!requireNamespace("caret")) install.packages('caret')
if (!requireNamespace("leaps")) install.packages('leaps')
if (!requireNamespace("bestglm")) install.packages('bestglm')
if (!requireNamespace("MASS")) install.packages('MASS')
if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2")) install.packages('ggplot2')
if (!requireNamespace("gridExtra")) install.packages('gridExtra')
if (!requireNamespace("dplyr"))install.packages("dplyr")
if (!requireNamespace("rpart"))install.packages("rpart")

library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(leaps)
library(bestglm)
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)
library(rpart)
```


![Alt text or caption](../data_info.png)

# load files
```{r}

data <- read_csv("../data/train.csv")
test <- read_csv("../data/test.csv")
head(data)
head(test)

```

```{r}
# Summary
summary(data)
summary(test)
```


```{r}
# Convert to dataframe
data <- data.frame(data)
test <- data.frame(test)

# Dtype
str(data)
str(test)

# NA
colSums(is.na(data))
colSums(is.na(test))
```
# Extract the group number from the passenger ID.
```{r}
data$Group <- as.integer(sub(".*_", "", data$PassengerId))
test$Group <- as.integer(sub(".*_", "", test$PassengerId))
data$Number <- as.integer(sub("_.*", "", data$PassengerId))
test$Number <- as.integer(sub("_.*", "", test$PassengerId))
unique(data$Group)
```

# Fill missing Homeplanet and Destination by Other
```{r}
# Home Planet
sum(is.na(data$HomePlanet))
unique(data$HomePlanet)
sum(is.na(test$HomePlanet))
unique(test$HomePlanet)

## Fill NA by Other
data$HomePlanet[is.na(data$HomePlanet)] <- "Other"
test$HomePlanet[is.na(test$HomePlanet)] <- "Other"

## Fill NA by Other
data$Destination[is.na(data$Destination)] <- "Other"
test$Destination[is.na(test$Destination)] <- "Other"

sum(is.na(data$HomePlanet))
unique(data$HomePlanet)
sum(is.na(test$HomePlanet))
unique(test$HomePlanet)


sum(is.na(data$Destination))
unique(data$Destination)
sum(is.na(test$Destination))
unique(test$Destination)
```

# Fill missing VIP by FALSE
```{r}
# Fill missing VIP values with FALSE
data <- data %>%
  mutate(VIP = ifelse(is.na(VIP), FALSE, VIP))

test <- test %>%
  mutate(VIP = ifelse(is.na(VIP), FALSE, VIP))
```

# Fill missing spendings by 0 and compute total spending.
```{r}
# Step 1: Make spending numeric
spending_cols <- c("RoomService", "FoodCourt", "ShoppingMall", "Spa", "VRDeck")
data[spending_cols] <- lapply(data[spending_cols], as.numeric)
test[spending_cols] <- lapply(test[spending_cols], as.numeric)

# Step 2: Convert NA to 0 for any spending ("RoomService", "FoodCourt", "ShoppingMall", "Spa", "VRDeck").
# List of attributes to fill
cols_to_fill <- c("RoomService", "FoodCourt", "ShoppingMall", "Spa", "VRDeck")
# Fill NAs with 0 in data
data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(cols_to_fill), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), 0, .)))
# Fill NAs with 0 in test
test <- test %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(cols_to_fill), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), 0, .)))

# Step 3: Compute total spending per passenger
data$total_spending <- rowSums(data[spending_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
test$total_spending <- rowSums(test[spending_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
```

# Split Cabin into Deck, Cabin_num, Side
```{r}
# Cabin Number Split:
data[c("Deck", "Cabin_num", "Side")] <- do.call(rbind, strsplit(data$Cabin, "/"))
test[c("Deck", "Cabin_num", "Side")] <- do.call(rbind, strsplit(test$Cabin, "/"))
```


# Fill missing Decks Based on total spending
```{r}
# Step 1: Compute deck means across both datasets
combined <- bind_rows(data, test)

deck_means <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Deck)) %>%   # exclude NAs here
  group_by(Deck) %>%
  summarise(mean_total_spending = mean(total_spending, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Step 2: Function to find closest deck
closest_deck <- function(spending, deck_means) {
  distances <- abs(deck_means$mean_total_spending - spending)
  deck_means$Deck[which.min(distances)]
}

# Step 3: Fill missing Decks in data
na_index <- which(is.na(data$Deck))
data$Deck[na_index] <- sapply(data$total_spending[na_index], closest_deck, deck_means = deck_means)

# Step 4: Fill missing Decks in test
na_index_test <- which(is.na(test$Deck))
test$Deck[na_index_test] <- sapply(test$total_spending[na_index_test], closest_deck, deck_means = deck_means)
```

# Fill the cabin_number with the most frequent number
```{r}
# Combine data and test to compute the mode
combined <- bind_rows(
  dplyr::select(data, Cabin_num),
  dplyr::select(test, Cabin_num)
)

# Compute the most frequent cabin number (mode)
mode_cabin <- as.numeric(names(sort(table(combined$Cabin_num), decreasing = TRUE)[1]))

# Fill missing Cabin_num in data
data$Cabin_num[is.na(data$Cabin_num)] <- mode_cabin

# Fill missing Cabin_num in test
test$Cabin_num[is.na(test$Cabin_num)] <- mode_cabin
```

# Fill the missing CryoSleep and convert Side to 0, and 1.
```{r}
combined <- bind_rows(data, test)

get_mode <- function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x[!is.na(x)])   # remove NAs
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

deck_cryosleep_mode <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(CryoSleep)) %>%          # ignore NAs
  group_by(Deck) %>%              # use Deck_filled after imputing Decks
  summarise(mode_CryoSleep = get_mode(CryoSleep), .groups = "drop")

fill_missing_CryoSleep <- function(row){
  if(is.na(row["CryoSleep"])){
    if(row["total_spending"] > 0){
      row["CryoSleep"] <- FALSE
    }else{
      row["CryoSleep"] <- deck_cryosleep_mode$mode_CryoSleep[
        deck_cryosleep_mode$Deck == row["Deck"]
      ]
    }
  }
  return(row)
}

# Convert Group to numeric
convert_side_0_1 <- function(row){
  if(is.na(row["Side"])){
    row["Side"] = NA
  }else if(row["Side"] == "P"){
    row["Side"] = 1
  }else{
    row["Side"] = 0
  }
  return(row)
}

data <- as.data.frame(t(apply(data, 1, fill_missing_CryoSleep)))
test <- as.data.frame(t(apply(test, 1, fill_missing_CryoSleep)))

data <- as.data.frame(t(apply(data, 1, convert_side_0_1)))
test <- as.data.frame(t(apply(test, 1, convert_side_0_1)))

data$Age <- as.numeric(data$Age)
data$RoomService <- as.numeric(data$RoomService)
data$FoodCourt <- as.numeric(data$FoodCourt)
data$ShoppingMall <- as.numeric(data$ShoppingMall)
data$Spa <- as.numeric(data$Spa)
data$VRDeck <- as.numeric(data$VRDeck)
data$Group <- as.numeric(data$Group)
data$Cabin_num <- as.numeric(data$Cabin_num)
data$total_spending <- as.numeric(data$total_spending)

data$Transported <- as.logical(data$Transported)
data$CryoSleep   <- as.logical(data$CryoSleep)
data$VIP         <- as.logical(data$VIP)

data$Transported <- as.numeric(data$Transported)
data$CryoSleep <- as.numeric(data$CryoSleep)
data$VIP     <- as.numeric(data$VIP)

test$Age <- as.numeric(test$Age)
test$RoomService <- as.numeric(test$RoomService)
test$FoodCourt <- as.numeric(test$FoodCourt)
test$ShoppingMall <- as.numeric(test$ShoppingMall)
test$Spa <- as.numeric(test$Spa)
test$VRDeck <- as.numeric(test$VRDeck)
test$Group <- as.numeric(test$Group)
test$Cabin_num <- as.numeric(test$Cabin_num)
test$total_spending <- as.numeric(test$total_spending)

test$CryoSleep   <- as.logical(test$CryoSleep)
test$VIP         <- as.logical(test$VIP)

test$CryoSleep <- as.numeric(test$CryoSleep)
test$VIP       <- as.numeric(test$VIP)

```

# Fill missing Ages by Dession tree
```{r}
combined <- bind_rows(data, test)

# Fit a regression tree using rows with known Age
age_tree <- rpart(
  Age ~ Deck + VIP + CryoSleep + total_spending + RoomService + FoodCourt + ShoppingMall + Spa + VRDeck + Group,
  data = combined[!is.na(data$Age), ],
  method = "anova"  # anova method = regression
)

# Predict Age for missing rows
data$Age[is.na(data$Age)] <- predict(age_tree, newdata = data[is.na(data$Age), ])
test$Age[is.na(test$Age)] <- predict(age_tree, newdata = test[is.na(test$Age), ])
```

# Fill missing Side by simple tree model.
```{r}
# Combine
combined <- bind_rows(data, test)

# Split known and missing Side
train_side <- combined %>% filter(!is.na(Side))
missing_side <- combined %>% filter(is.na(Side))

# Predictors
predictors <- c("HomePlanet", "CryoSleep", "Destination", "Age", "VIP",
                "RoomService", "FoodCourt", "ShoppingMall", "Spa", "VRDeck",
                "Group", "Deck")

# Convert character → factor
train_side[predictors] <- lapply(train_side[predictors], function(x) {
  if(is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
})

missing_side[predictors] <- lapply(missing_side[predictors], function(x) {
  if(is.character(x)) factor(x) else x
})

# Convert Side to factor (IMPORTANT for classification)
train_side$Side <- factor(train_side$Side)

# Fit decision tree
side_tree <- rpart(
  formula = as.formula(paste("Side ~", paste(predictors, collapse = " + "))),
  data = train_side,
  method = "class"
)

# Predict missing Side
predicted_side <- predict(side_tree, newdata = missing_side, type = "class")

# Convert existing Side to numeric
combined$Side_num <- as.numeric(as.character(combined$Side))

# Fill missing with predictions
combined$Side_num[is.na(combined$Side_num)] <- as.numeric(as.character(predicted_side))

data$Side <- combined$Side_num[1:nrow(data)]
test$Side <- combined$Side_num[(nrow(data)+1):nrow(combined)]
```

# Fill missing cabins with the predicted Deck/Cabin_num/Side
```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(Side_char = ifelse(Side == 1, "P", "S"))

test <- test %>%
  mutate(Side_char = ifelse(Side == 1, "P", "S"))

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    Cabin = ifelse(
      is.na(Cabin),
      paste(Deck, Cabin_num, Side_char, sep = "/"),
      Cabin
    )
  )

test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    Cabin = ifelse(
      is.na(Cabin),
      paste(Deck, Cabin_num, Side_char, sep = "/"),
      Cabin
    )
  )

data$Side_char <- NULL
test$Side_char <- NULL
```

# Save File after cleaning.
```{r}
write.csv(data, "../data/cleaned_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(test, "../data/cleaned_test.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
